mageGuild1.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild1.name: Mage Guild Level 1

mageGuild2.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild2.name: Mage Guild Level 2

mageGuild3.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild3.name: Mage Guild Level 3

mageGuild4.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild4.name: Mage Guild Level 4

mageGuild5.description: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
mageGuild5.name: Mage Guild Level 5

tavern.name: Tavern
tavern.description: The Tavern increases morale for troops defending the city.

fort.name: Fort
fort.description: The Fort provides your town with defensive walls.

citadel.name: Citadel
citadel.description: Including a 50% increase to base creature growth, the Citadel adds a keep, and other terrain obstacles, to a town's defenses.

castle.name: Castle
castle.description: The Castle adds two arrow towers, fortifies your town's defenses, and doubles base creature growth.

villageHall.name: Village Hall
villageHall.description: The Village Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 500 gold per day.

townHall.name: Town Hall
townHall.description: The Town Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 1000 gold per day.

cityHall.name: City Hall
cityHall.description: The City Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 2000 gold per day.

capitol.name: Capitol
capitol.description: The Capitol earns your kingdom 4000 gold per day.

marketplace.name: Marketplace
marketplace.description: With the Marketplace, you can buy and sell resources (exchange rates increase with each Marketplace you own).

resourceSilo.description: The Resource Silo provides you with an additional +1 crystal each day.
resourceSilo.name: Resource Silo

blacksmith.description: The Blacksmith provides your armies with First Aid Tents.
blacksmith.name: Blacksmith

horde1.description: The Fairy Garden increases weekly growth of Fairies and Sylvan Fairies by 10.
horde1.name: Fairy Garden

horde2.description: The Forest Guild increases weekly growth of Hunters and Master Hunters by 3.
horde2.name: Forest Guild

special1.description: Stonehenge increases the Spell Power of a visiting hero by 1.
special1.name: Stonehenge

rewards.message: The Stonehenge teach you new ways to focus your magical powers (+1 Power)

special2.description: Aurora Borealis adds an extra spell to the Mage Guild.
special2.name: Aurora Borealis

special3.name: Altar of Distortions
special3.description: The Altar of Distortions allows heroes of this town to learn the Distortions skill.

configuration.onVisitedMessage: Your hero has already mastered the lore of the Distortions.

rewards.message: Do you want your hero to master the lore of the Distortions?

onEmpty.message: Your hero attempts to master the lore of the Distortions in vain. Already possessing many skills, your hero is unable to learn anything new.
Your hero attempts to master the lore of the Distortions before realizing they are unable to read them. It appears as though this art is only accessible to locals and competent scholars.

special4.description: The Well fully restores the spell points of a visiting hero.
special4.name: Well

rewards.message:
{Magic Fountain}

A drink from the fountain has restored your spell points to maximum.

grail.description: The presence of the Forest Guardian increases weekly creature growth by 50%, provides an additional 5000 gold per day, and increases the power of all spells by 50%.
grail.name: Forest Guardian

dwellingLvl1.description: The Magical Forest allows you to recruit Fairies.
dwellingLvl1.name: Magical Forest

dwellingLvl2.description: The Cottage allows you to recruit Hunters.
dwellingLvl2.name: Cottage

dwellingLvl3.description: The Belvedere allows you to recruit Blade Dancers.
dwellingLvl3.name: Belvedere

dwellingLvl4.description: The Tree House allows you to recruit Dryads.
dwellingLvl4.name: Tree House

dwellingLvl5.description: The Floating Altar allows you to recruit Priestesses.
dwellingLvl5.name: Floating Altar

dwellingLvl6.description: The Stone Circle allows you to recruit Forest Defenders.
dwellingLvl6.name: Stone Circle

dwellingLvl7.description: The Mountain Lair allows you to recruit Mountain Giants.
dwellingLvl7.name: Mountain Lair

dwellingUpLvl1.description: The Upgraded Magical Forest allows you to recruit Sylvan Fairies.
dwellingUpLvl1.name: Upg. Magical Forest

dwellingUpLvl2.description: The Upgraded Cottage allows you to recruit Master Hunters.
dwellingUpLvl2.name: Upg. Cottage

dwellingUpLvl3.description: The Upgraded Belvedere allows you to recruit War Dancers.
dwellingUpLvl3.name: Upg. Belvedere

dwellingUpLvl4.description: The Upgraded Tree House allows you to recruit Sylvan Dryads.
dwellingUpLvl4.name: Upg. Tree House

dwellingUpLvl5.description: The Upgraded Floating Altar allows you to recruit High Priestesses.
dwellingUpLvl5.name: Upg. Floating Altar

dwellingUpLvl6.description: The Upgraded Stone Circle allows you to recruit Forest Wardens.
dwellingUpLvl6.name: Upg. Stone Circle

dwellingUpLvl7.description: The Upgraded Mountain Lair allows you to recruit Ancient Giants.
dwellingUpLvl7.name: Upg. Mountain Lair
